description: Create a protected fire safety inspection form in Microsoft Word 2010. The document should feature a bold, centered title 'BUILDING FIRE SAFETY INSPECTION FORM' and contain four specific sections: 'Building Information' with text form fields for Building Name, Address, Inspector Name, and Inspection Date; 'Inspection Checklist' with 8 checkbox form fields for items such as Fire extinguishers, Exit signs, Fire alarm, and Sprinkler system; 'Overall Assessment' with a dropdown form field containing 'Pass', 'Conditional Pass', and 'Fail'; and a 'Comments' section with a text form field. Use legacy form fields and protect the document for 'Filling in forms' only (no password required). Save the completed form to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\fire_inspection_form.docx.
